name: Sprunki Sniper Squid Game
description: In Sprunki Sniper Squid Game, players must stay still and wait for the sound to stop. Once the sound fades, each character, known as a Sprunki, is marked for elimination. Web Dev <a href='https://www.playonline.top/'>https://www.playonline.top/</a> Players must carefully time their movements to avoid becoming a target of the sniper in this tense, strategic game.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Mentolatux, Shooting, Sniper, Sprunki, squid, squidgame, Unity3D, WebGL
